source.prompt:
Project title: My Cousin Kicked a Nuno’s Mound. That Night, Something Followed Him Home..
Story mode: short_story; target platform: local_only.
Section 1 of 4: Introduction.
Section purpose: Set the atmosphere of the story and introduce Carlo's first fright..
Beat 1 of 5 in this section.
Previous beat narration: none; this opens the section.
Current beat narration: At exactly 11:46 PM, during a brownout in their province, nine-year-old Carlo woke up screaming that something was biting his feet.
Next beat narration: His mother rushed into the room with a candle.

Visual target:
A pitch-black bedroom illuminated by a flickering candle, with Carlo's terrified face visible as shadows loom in the background.

Create a vertical 9:16 photorealistic cinematic still for a suspense story video.
Depict the exact current beat, not a generic mood board and not a later event.
Preserve continuity with the immediately previous and next beats, but do not introduce objects, characters, or reveals that have not happened yet.
Use natural lens perspective, believable human anatomy, grounded lighting, subtle film grain, and environmental detail.
Avoid glossy AI fantasy style, plastic skin, over-smoothed faces, surreal distortions, extra fingers, fake text, UI, subtitles, watermarks, logos, split screens, and soundwave graphics.
Make it look like a frame from an atmospheric indie thriller shot on a real camera.

Project title: My Cousin Kicked a Nuno’s Mound. That Night, Something Followed Him Home..
Story mode: short_story; target platform: local_only.
Section 2 of 4: The Curse of the Mound.
Section purpose: To illustrate how Carlo’s actions disturb the spirit world..
Beat 1 of 8 in this section.
Previous beat narration: none; this opens the section.
Current beat narration: Earlier that afternoon, Carlo had been playing with his cousins behind their Lola’s house.
Next beat narration: There was an old mound of dirt under the santol tree — small, round, and covered in grass.

Visual target:
A sunlit backyard with children playing joyfully, the mound in the background partly hidden under a santol tree.
